name: 3D Card Effect
description: A card component with interactive 3D tilt/rotation effect that responds to mouse movement, creating depth and perspective.
whenToUse: Use for featured content cards, product showcases, or portfolio items where you want an engaging hover interaction.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render inside the 3D card container

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the card container

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the outer perspective container

codeExample: import { CardBody, CardContainer, CardItem } from "@/components/ui/3d-card" export function ThreeDCardDemo() { return ( Make things float in air Hover over this card to unleash the power of CSS perspective ) }
